ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_amt" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_dttm" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_reversal_xflg" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the transaction was reversed (Y/N) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Reference ID for external systems */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateway_integration ("gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the payment method is active (Y/N) */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the payment method was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of transaction */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_reversible" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the transaction type can be reversed (Y/N) */,
  "min_amount" TEXT /* Minimum transaction amount for this type */,
  "max_amount" TEXT /* Maximum transaction amount for this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_integration" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway provider */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the payment gateway */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the gateway is active (Y/N) */,
  "last_integration_date" TEXT /* Date the gateway was last integrated */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message providing details about the transaction or action taken */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, customer service) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Transaction affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reversals" (
  "reversal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reversal */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original transaction being reversed */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the reversal */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the reversal */,
  "reversal_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reversal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the reversal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reversal (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reversal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reversals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reversals_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
